message:
fix(freeze): fix unsigned right shift and crypto hash with embedded nulls

- Map QuickJS shr opcode to CV.ushr for proper JavaScript >>> semantics
- Add floatToInt32/floatToUint32 helpers for JavaScript ToInt32/ToUint32
- Fix all bitwise operations (band, bor, bxor, shl, shr, sar, bnot) to
  use floatToInt32 for proper handling of large floats
- Fix crypto.hash to use JS_ToCStringLen instead of JS_ToCString+span
  to properly handle strings with embedded null bytes

Fixes uuid v5 producing identical hashes for different inputs (18/18 pass)
